title: MundialMons ReaniPack [CobbleMon]
description: The add-on adds Pokémon that have not yet been modeled and re-animations to some Pokémon of cobblemon
body:
# What does it add?

Pokémon add-on that adds at least one Pokémon from a corresponding region.
Reanimations and remodels to Cobblemon Pokémon

# Pokemons Added
* Gulpin,Swalot
* Drilbur,Excadrill
* Mienfoo,Mienshao
* Rolycoly,Carkol and Coalossal
* Skwovet,Greedent
* Spritzee,Aromatisse
* Pancham,pangoro
* Yamask,Runerigus
* Toxel,Toxtricity amped and Toxtricity low-key
* Chewtle,Drednaw
* Cloboppus,Grapploct
* Blipbug,Dottler and Orbeetle
* Applin,Appletun and flapple
* Galar Mr mime,Mr rime
* Inkay,Malamar
* Helioptile,Heliolisk

# Installation

After downloading the Datapack, be sure to put it in your "resources" folder and "datapack" folder within your world.
